products_list.name: 21k Gold Heritage Necklace Set
products_list.description:
Adorn yourself in the ultimate expression of luxury with our complete 21k gold necklace sets. Made from solid, high-purity 21k yellow gold to ensure a radiant, deep golden color, each set features a beautifully detailed matching necklace and earrings. Designed with traditional Middle Eastern motifs and intricate filigree work, these sets are perfect for brides, weddings, and formal celebrations. A breathtaking statement of elegance and prestige, and a timeless addition to your family's heritage jewelry collection.

Material: 21k Solid Yellow Gold
Set Includes: Matching necklace and coordinate earrings, and a matching Ring,
Craftsmanship: Artisan-engraved with traditional filigree detailing
Occasion: Perfect for brides, wedding dowries, and grand celebrations
